_note: Task draft exhibiting two split signals: (1) 6 Gherkin scenarios across clearly distinct journeys (permission, PDF content, empty state, schema migration, background worker, UI trigger), (2) 5 impacted areas spanning DB migration, service logic, API route, UI component, and background job. Step 9 should fire the scope gate and propose a split.

task.title: Implement settlement export pipeline
task.draft_body:
## Intent
Implement the full settlement export pipeline: schema migration, business logic, API endpoint, UI trigger, and async PDF generation.

## Gherkin
```gherkin
Feature: Settlement export pipeline

  Scenario: Merchant triggers an export
    Given a Merchant with the settlement.export permission
    When the Merchant clicks Export PDF
    Then a SettlementExportRequested event is emitted
    And the Merchant sees an 'Export in progress' indicator

  Scenario: Merchant without permission cannot export
    Given a Merchant without the settlement.export permission
    When the Merchant views the settlement list
    Then the Export PDF button is not visible

  Scenario: PDF is generated with correct merchant header
    Given a SettlementExportRequested event has been emitted
    When the export job completes
    Then the PDF includes the Merchant name and the selected date range

  Scenario: Empty settlement range produces a placeholder PDF
    Given a Merchant has no settlements in the selected date range
    When the Merchant requests a PDF export
    Then the downloaded PDF contains a 'No settlements found' message with column headers

  Scenario: Database migration adds the export_jobs table
    Given the export_jobs table does not exist
    When the migration runs
    Then the export_jobs table exists with id, merchant_id, status, and created_at columns

  Scenario: Background worker processes export requests from the queue
    Given a SettlementExportRequested event is waiting in the export queue
    When the PDF worker polls the queue
    Then the worker claims the job and the export status changes to 'processing'
```

## Impacted Areas
- `src/db/migrations/` — new export_jobs table
- `src/services/settlement-export/` — export business logic
- `src/api/routes/settlements.ts` — new POST /settlements/export endpoint
- `src/ui/components/SettlementList/` — Export PDF button and progress indicator
- `src/workers/pdf-export/` — background PDF generation job

## Proposed Vertical Slice
This task covers the full export pipeline from UI click through to delivered PDF.
